kickoff_budget_note: Within the default AGENTS.md low-risk budget: 4 completed tasks, 3 reviewed handoff files, no shared or integrator-locked edits, and required local gates rerun before handoff.
roadmap_items: Citation-bundle metadata propagation: keep retrieval metadata explicit and stable in `src/qual/engine/retrieval/payload.py` and `src/qual/retrieval/service.py`.
